Release notes for beta7-pre-rc, adding support for Pebble Steel charging indicator and bug fixes.

# Purpose
The content documents a change in the software codebase that adds support for a Pebble Steel charging indicator. It also includes a section titled `Bug Fixes`, which is intended to list any corrections made to the software, although no specific bug fixes are detailed in the provided content.
